summary: Matched the Kinoko item module by replacing asm/melee/it/items/itkinoko.s with C, switching build config from the asm object to src/melee/it/items/itkinoko.c, and adding the headers/types needed for collision, item variable, callback, and special-attribute access. The PR also renamed the local symbol fn_80293884 to it_80293884 in symbols.txt and added MPCOLL_UNK for a collision env_flags mask used by Kinoko ground collision handling.

key_files.role: Deleted 313-line assembly implementation after matching it in C.
Added 153-line matched C implementation for Kinoko item behavior and ItemStateTable it_803F6110.
Expanded prototypes and added KinokoAnim and KinokoAttrs structs.
Added KinokoVars for the Item xDD4_itemVar union.
Added kinoko member to Item.xDD4_itemVar union.
Included lb/types.h and declared it_80276408(Item_GObj*, CollData*, f32*).
Changed itkinoko.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Swapped TEXT_O_FILES from asm/melee/it/items/itkinoko.s.o to src/melee/it/items/itkinoko.c.o.

what_changed: Recreated ItemStateTable it_803F6110 as two item states: {0, it_80293754, it_8029375C, it_80293798} and {0, it_802938AC, it_802938B4, it_80293964}.
Matched the animation-attribute accessor it_80293660 using it_804D6D24[It_Kind_Kinoko]->x4_specialAttributes and returning attrs[idx + 2].joint.
Implemented Kinoko initialization: sets facing_dir based on pos.x, clears xD5C, initializes kinoko item vars x0/x4/x8/xC to 0/0/1/0, then calls it_8029385C.
Implemented ground movement update using KinokoAttrs x0 multiplied by facing_dir and scaled by kinoko.x8 into x40_vel.x.

Implemented collision response using CollData env_flags: calls it_80276408 when MPCOLL_UNK is set, resets kinoko.x4 otherwise, and flips facing direction and horizontal velocity on left/right wall collision.
Implemented air physics/deceleration in it_802938B4 using it_80272860 with item fall speeds and KinokoAttrs x4 as horizontal deceleration threshold/step.
Implemented ground/air transition behavior through it_8026D78C with callback it_80293884 and it_8026E7E0 with callback it_802936E4.
Added typed KinokoAttrs, KinokoAnim, and KinokoVars to replace raw special-attribute and item-var offsets.
Updated build metadata so the matching C object is compiled instead of the assembly object.
smart_moves: Kept behavior-preserving numeric names for still-unknown Kinoko fields (x0, x4, x8, xC) while still introducing structs, which improves type safety without overclaiming semantics.
Moved the anonymous local callback symbol from fn_80293884 to it_80293884, aligning it with neighboring item function naming and allowing it to be referenced cleanly from C.
Added the shared MPCOLL_UNK mask in common_structs.h instead of open-coding 0x18000 inside itkinoko.c, making the bitmask reusable for later collision matches.
Declared only the needed external item/collision helpers in headers, including it_8026E7E0 and it_80276408, rather than relying on undeclared calls.
Used the existing item idioms GET_ITEM, ItemStateTable, Item_80268E5C flags, Item_8026AE84, it_8026D78C, and it_8026E7E0 to express the matched state machine in project style.
Used PAD_STACK in functions where the C needed stack padding to match the original assembly.
decomp_lessons: For item modules, matching often requires updating all three layers together: delete the asm file, switch obj_files.mk to the C object, and mark the object Matching in configure.py.
When xDD4_itemVar storage is item-specific, add a named per-item vars struct to itCommonItems.h and insert it into the Item union in types.h before writing the module C.
If a decompiled function needs a callback address that was previously a local asm label, promote/rename the symbol in symbols.txt and declare it in the item header.
Collision env_flags masks from rlwinm/clrlwi assembly should be centralized as MPCOLL_* constants when they are likely reusable or already fit the common collision flag pattern.
Do not over-name special-attribute fields until semantics are known; KinokoAttrs keeps x0/x4/x8 while still documenting layout and types.
Small item callbacks that simply call Item_80268E5C can be matched as named C functions and used in transition helpers such as it_8026D78C.
naming_conventions: Item module functions retained address-based names: it_80293660 through it_802939E8.
The anonymous-looking symbol fn_80293884 was renamed to the module-prefixed it_80293884.
New item-specific structs use item-name prefixes: KinokoAnim, KinokoAttrs, and KinokoVars.
Unknown fields in newly introduced structs remain offset-style names such as x0, x4, x8, and xC.
The item-var union member is lowercase item name: xDD4_itemVar.kinoko.
Collision constants use the shared MPCOLL_* macro namespace; this PR added MPCOLL_UNK.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(8) in it_802936E4 and PAD_STACK(16) in it_80293798 to reproduce original stack shape.
Matched 0.0f, -1.0f, and 1.0f sdata2 constants directly as floating literals in C.
Recovered the state table from .data as ItemStateTable it_803F6110[] with two entries.
Converted the assembly callback label at 0x80293884 into a real C function used by it_8026D78C.
Matched branch behavior around horizontal deceleration by using an early return when abs(x40_vel.x) is below KinokoAttrs x4, then subtracting or adding x4 based on velocity sign.
Translated collision bit tests into readable env_flags checks for MPCOLL_UNK, MPCOLL_RIGHTWALL, and MPCOLL_LEFTWALL.
Used the expression attrs[idx + 2].joint for the animation joint accessor, matching the assembly load sequence that indexed special attributes with an offset.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review bodies were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename KinokoAttrs fields x0 x4 x8 with semantic names.
Search for MPCOLL_UNK usage after PR 1445 to see whether 0x18000 was refined or renamed.
Search for other item modules that use it_80276408 with CollData and an xDD4 item-var float.
Compare itdkinoko matching work with itkinoko for shared mushroom item patterns.
Find PRs that replaced fn_* symbols with module-prefixed it_* callbacks for item state tables.
